title: vnd.cyrus.implicit_keep_target (Cyrus/Fastmail)
description: Implement Cyrus implicit_keep_target extension. Syntax: implicit_keep_target [:specialuse <flag>] [:mailboxid <id>] <mailbox-name>. Sets the default delivery mailbox when implicit keep is triggered (no explicit disposition). Cannot combine :specialuse and :mailboxid. Example: implicit_keep_target :specialuse "\\Important" "INBOX". Documented in Cyrus IMAP source and cyrusimap.org/imap/reference/admin/sieve.html.
